@115 [Edim | E]
  Guitar  : A2@1>1^104 A#3@2>1^104 E3@3>1^104 A2@4>1^104 A3@5>1^104 D#3@6>1^104 A3@7>1^104 A#3@8>1^104 A3@9>2^104
